summary: Comprehensive QA validation of Performance Dashboard v2. Found and fixed 3 bugs: (1) gap day display truncation showing '202' instead of 'Sat', (2) inverted backlog logic showing 'clearing' when actually 'adding', (3) same inversion in signal detection. Validated all 9 data integrations - all working except mood (no recent data). Calendar, weather, vitals, tasks, content all returning correct data. Dashboard now generates accurate reports.
decisions: Fixed gap_day by converting ISO date to weekday name via datetime.strptime
Corrected net_change logic: positive = clearing, negative = adding
Applied same fix to signal detection consistency
concerns: Mood data source has no recent entries (journal.db)
longest_gap.window field not populated by calendar_metrics - minor display issue
Calendar cache should be refreshed before dashboard generation in scheduled task
notes_for_orchestrator: All 3 bugs were display/logic issues in performance_dashboard.py - no changes needed to performance_data.py or the metric modules. The data layer is solid. Consider adding calendar cache refresh to the scheduled dashboard task.
